---
title: "Field Notes"
subtitle: "Working notes on code, analytics, and AI — from the Digital Summer Clinic 2026 and beyond."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Welcome. I'm **Matthew Zhou** — a digital builder working where **code** meets
**analytics**. This is where I think out loud about what I'm building, what I'm
learning toward my Google Analytics certification, and the industry reading that
shapes how I work. New post every week. 👇
